executor_steps: Insert an annex agree block into the systemHM_process component type (not implementation) to declare signal flow guarantees using only visible identifiers: arlarm_acc_in, arlarm_adirup_in, systemHM_action_acc_hm, systemHM_action_adirup.

Within the annex, state two guarantees: one that arlarm_acc_in flows to alarmAggregator.arlarm_acc_in via C1, and another that arlarm_adirup_in flows to alarmAggregator.arlarm_adirup_in via C2, using only port names and connection identifiers as visible relations without package qualifiers or type membership.
Do not introduce any new identifiers, constants, or semantic claims beyond what is implied by the signal flow intent and the existing AADL connections C1 and C2.
